Technical summary of the approach.

## Testing

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Tested in Docker container with linuxserver/deluge
- [ ] Verified bot responds to commands from Telegram

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`fix/`, `feat/`, `docs/`, `ci/`)
- [ ] No hardcoded tokens or secrets
- [ ] Existing tests still pass
- [ ] New tests added if needed
